1). System Architecture


Design a full local stack using:

Ollama as the model manager

Docker as the orchestration layer

MilvusDB for vector storage

CLI access (AI assistant via terminal)

Web UI (Fast, local ChatGPT-like interface)

Embedding pipeline

API layer for internal R&D tools


==========================================================


2). Installation & Setup


  steps for installing and configuring:

Docker Desktop

Ollama (GPU-enabled on Windows)

MilvusDB (Docker compose setup)

Web UI options:

OpenWebUI

Ollama WebUI

CLI integration

PowerShell



======================================================================


3). Local RAG System (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)


 build a R&D RAG pipeline:

File ingestion   (Getting files => extracting text => sending to Milvus)

Chunking strategy  (splitting your documents before storing them)

Embedding strategy  (Create embeddings so your RAG system can quickly find the most relevant pieces of information)

Storing vectors in MilvusDB

Connecting RAG to Ollama

=================================================================================


4). Optimization & Speed



GPU optimization

Model quantization

Memory usage

Fast document ingestion

============================================================================================


5). Security & Access Control


Restrict LLM usage to R&D users

Run everything offline

Set user permissions for Web UI

Secure MilvusDB
